security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420 ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'

bundle.longDescription: LibreTether is a self-hosted remote desktop controller. Enrol your machines with a one-click deployment script, reach them over your own private Tailscale mesh, check their status, run commands, take screenshots, and take over the screen with full mouse and keyboard control.
bundle.shortDescription: Self-hosted remote desktop control over a private mesh
